example: We need to take immediate action to solve this problem.
exampleZh: 我们需要立即采取行动来解决这个问题。

example: You need to activate your account before you can use the service.
exampleZh: 你需要激活你的账户才能使用这项服务。

example: He did not react to the news as we had expected.
exampleZh: 他对这个消息的反应并不如我们所预期的那样。

example: Could you tell me the exact time of the meeting?
exampleZh: 你能告诉我会议的确切时间吗？

example: The actual cost was much higher than we estimated.
exampleZh: 实际成本比我们估计的要高得多。

example: Children learn to interact with others at an early age.
exampleZh: 孩子在很小的时候就学会与他人互动。

example: His behavior at the party was completely unacceptable.
exampleZh: 他在聚会上的行为完全不可接受。

example: The police will conduct an investigation into the incident.
exampleZh: 警方将对这起事件进行调查。

example: Her ambition is to become a successful entrepreneur one day.
exampleZh: 她的抱负是有一天成为一名成功的企业家。

example: The archaeologists discovered an ancient temple buried under the sand.
exampleZh: 考古学家发现了一座埋在沙子下面的古代神庙。

example: We stared at the magnificent waterfall in awe and wonder.
exampleZh: 我们敬畏而惊奇地凝视着壮观的瀑布。

example: The weather was awful, so we decided to stay indoors.
exampleZh: 天气很糟糕，所以我们决定待在室内。

example: She received an award for her outstanding contribution to science.
exampleZh: 她因对科学的杰出贡献而获得了一个奖项。

example: Hard work and dedication will eventually bring you great rewards.
exampleZh: 努力工作和奉献精神最终会给你带来巨大的回报。

example: There was an awkward silence after he made the inappropriate joke.
exampleZh: 在他开了那个不合时宜的玩笑之后，出现了尴尬的沉默。

example: The clown tried his best to amuse the children at the party.
exampleZh: 小丑尽力在派对上逗乐孩子们。

example: Her ability to learn new languages never ceases to amaze me.
exampleZh: 她学习新语言的能力总是让我惊叹不已。

example: A dark figure began to loom out of the thick fog ahead of us.
exampleZh: 一个黑影开始从我们前方的浓雾中隐约出现。

example: The economic boom of the 1990s created many new jobs.
exampleZh: 20世纪90年代的经济繁荣创造了许多新的就业机会。

example: The cherry trees are in full bloom during the spring season.
exampleZh: 樱花在春季盛开。

example: A sense of gloom filled the room after the bad news arrived.
exampleZh: 坏消息传来后，房间里充满了忧郁的气氛。

example: Eating a healthy breakfast can boost your energy for the whole day.
exampleZh: 吃一顿健康的早餐可以提高一整天的精力。

example: He likes to boast about his achievements in front of others.
exampleZh: 他喜欢在别人面前吹嘘自己的成就。

example: Let us raise our glasses and make a toast to the newlyweds.
exampleZh: 让我们举杯向新婚夫妇祝酒。

example: Do not exaggerate the situation; it is not as bad as you think.
exampleZh: 不要夸大情况，事情并没有你想的那么糟。

example: It is important to maintain a balance between work and personal life.
exampleZh: 保持工作和个人生活之间的平衡很重要。

example: She began to blush when everyone sang happy birthday to her.
exampleZh: 当大家为她唱生日快乐歌时，她开始脸红了。

example: Please remember to flush the toilet after you use it.
exampleZh: 使用完马桶后请记得冲洗。

example: The children love to splash water at each other in the pool.
exampleZh: 孩子们喜欢在游泳池里互相泼水。

example: Honesty is an admirable trait that everyone should try to develop.
exampleZh: 诚实是每个人都应努力培养的一种令人钦佩的品质。

example: He would never betray his friend's trust for personal gain.
exampleZh: 他绝不会为了个人利益而背叛朋友的信任。

example: The soldier was labeled a traitor for leaking classified information.
exampleZh: 那名士兵因泄露机密信息而被贴上叛徒的标签。

example: It took a long time to convince my parents to let me study abroad.
exampleZh: 我花了很长时间才说服父母让我出国留学。

example: She always finds something to complain about no matter what happens.
exampleZh: 无论发生什么，她总能找到可抱怨的事情。

example: I marked the important dates on my calendar so I would not forget.
exampleZh: 我在日历上标记了重要日期，这样就不会忘记了。

example: The president exercised his veto power to block the proposed bill.
exampleZh: 总统行使了否决权来阻止这项提案。

example: You should take one dose of this medicine every eight hours.
exampleZh: 你应该每八小时服用一剂这种药。

example: It was entirely my fault that we missed the flight yesterday.
exampleZh: 昨天我们错过航班完全是我的错。

example: A gigantic statue of the hero stood in the center of the square.
exampleZh: 一座巨大的英雄雕像矗立在广场中央。

example: The deputy manager will take charge while the boss is away.
exampleZh: 老板不在时，副经理将负责管理。

example: Never neglect your health while you are busy pursuing your career.
exampleZh: 在忙于追求事业时，绝不要忽视你的健康。

example: He continued to deny any involvement in the scandal.
exampleZh: 他继续否认与这起丑闻有任何牵连。

example: The long journey exhausted all of us by the time we finally arrived.
exampleZh: 长途旅行让我们到达时都精疲力尽了。

example: You can change the default settings to suit your personal preferences.
exampleZh: 你可以更改默认设置以适合你的个人偏好。

example: The project required an immense amount of time and effort to complete.
exampleZh: 这个项目需要投入巨大的时间和精力才能完成。

example: Our company always puts the needs of the client first.
exampleZh: 我们公司始终把客户的需求放在第一位。

example: Learning a new language is a challenge, but it is very rewarding.
exampleZh: 学习一门新语言是一个挑战，但它非常有价值。

example: By convention, you should shake hands when meeting someone for business.
exampleZh: 按照惯例，商务会面时你应该握手。

example: Online shopping offers great convenience for people with busy schedules.
exampleZh: 网上购物为日程繁忙的人提供了极大的便利。

example: Africa is the second largest continent in the world by population.
exampleZh: 按人口计算，非洲是世界上第二大陆。

example: Open the windows to let fresh air circulate through the room.
exampleZh: 打开窗户让新鲜空气在房间里流通。

example: We need to calculate the total cost before making a final decision.
exampleZh: 在做最终决定之前，我们需要计算总成本。

example: The boat began to drift slowly away from the shore.
exampleZh: 船开始慢慢地漂离岸边。

example: She is working on the first draft of her novel right now.
exampleZh: 她现在正在写她的小说的第一稿。

example: The leaves float gently on the surface of the calm lake.
exampleZh: 树叶在平静的湖面上轻轻漂浮。

example: This compact car is perfect for driving and parking in the city.
exampleZh: 这辆紧凑型汽车非常适合在城市里驾驶和停车。

example: She felt jealous when her best friend won the first prize.
exampleZh: 当最好的朋友获得一等奖时，她感到嫉妒。

example: The cake was perfectly moist and delicious with every single bite.
exampleZh: 这蛋糕湿润度恰到好处，每一口都美味无比。

example: Sending that email to the wrong person was a serious blunder.
exampleZh: 把那封邮件发错人是一个严重的错误。

zh: 不正常的；异常的；反常的
example: The test results showed some abnormal readings that concerned the doctor.
exampleZh: 测试结果显示了一些令医生担忧的异常读数。

example: It was a tough decision, but I knew it was the right one.
exampleZh: 这是一个艰难的决定，但我知道这是正确的选择。

example: The forest was so dense that sunlight could hardly reach the ground.
exampleZh: 森林如此茂密，阳光几乎无法照射到地面。

example: There was a lot of drama at the office after the sudden resignation.
exampleZh: 突然辞职后，办公室里发生了很多戏剧性事件。

example: The basement felt cold and damp after the heavy rain last night.
exampleZh: 昨晚大雨后，地下室感觉又冷又潮。

example: We have set a sales target of one million dollars for this quarter.
exampleZh: 我们为本季度设定了100万美元的销售目标。

example: She has received numerous awards for her work in the field of medicine.
exampleZh: 她因在医学领域的工作获得了众多奖项。

example: You can condense the report into a one-page summary for the meeting.
exampleZh: 你可以把报告浓缩成一页摘要供会议使用。

example: Every citizen has the right to cast a vote in the election.
exampleZh: 每个公民都有权在选举中投票。

example: The government has decided to levy a new tax on imported goods.
exampleZh: 政府已决定对进口商品征收新税。

example: Her success filled her colleagues with a mixture of admiration and envy.
exampleZh: 她的成功让同事们既钦佩又嫉妒。

example: The sudden loss of her parents was a terrible tragedy for the young girl.
exampleZh: 父母突然离世对这个小女孩来说是一场可怕的悲剧。

example: We watched a hilarious comedy that made us laugh all evening long.
exampleZh: 我们看了一部搞笑的喜剧，整晚都在笑。

example: The soldiers suffered from extreme fatigue after marching for three days.
exampleZh: 士兵们在行军三天后感到极度疲劳。

example: After a long day of work, she felt weary and just wanted to rest.
exampleZh: 经过一天漫长的工作后，她感到疲倦，只想休息。

example: You should not dump your waste into the river because it pollutes the water.
exampleZh: 你不应该把垃圾倒进河里，这会污染水质。

example: The software crashed due to a critical error in the program code.
exampleZh: 由于程序代码中的一个严重错误，软件崩溃了。

example: To be blunt, I do not think your plan will work as you intended.
exampleZh: 恕我直言，我认为你的计划不会如预期那样奏效。

example: Be careful with that knife because the blade is extremely sharp.
exampleZh: 小心那把刀，刀刃非常锋利。

example: We need to stick to our budget if we want to save enough money.
exampleZh: 如果我们想存够钱，就需要严格遵守预算。

example: The tech giant announced a new product that shocked the entire industry.
exampleZh: 这家科技巨头发布了一款震惊整个行业的新产品。

example: The project was a tremendous success, exceeding all of our expectations.
exampleZh: 这个项目取得了巨大的成功，超出了我们所有人的预期。

example: An enormous whale surfaced right next to our small fishing boat.
exampleZh: 一头巨大的鲸鱼在我们小渔船旁边浮出水面。

example: I strongly urge you to reconsider your decision before it is too late.
exampleZh: 我强烈敦促你在为时已晚之前重新考虑你的决定。

example: The travel agent helped us book flights and hotels for our vacation.
exampleZh: 旅行社代理人帮我们预订了度假的航班和酒店。

example: The sea was very rough, and many passengers felt seasick on board.
exampleZh: 海面风浪很大，许多乘客在船上晕船了。

example: The doctor performed a thorough examination to find the cause of the pain.
exampleZh: 医生进行了彻底的检查以找出疼痛的原因。

example: The meat was so tender that it practically melted in my mouth.
exampleZh: 这块肉嫩得几乎在我嘴里融化了。

example: We had a mild winter this year with very little snow and ice.
exampleZh: 今年冬天很温和，几乎没有雪和冰。

example: He chose to ignore the negative comments and focus on his work.
exampleZh: 他选择无视那些负面评论，专心工作。

example: The athlete was in agony after tearing a muscle during the race.
exampleZh: 运动员在比赛中肌肉撕裂后痛苦不堪。

example: I am sorry to bother you, but could you help me with this problem?
exampleZh: 很抱歉打扰你，但你能帮我解决这个问题吗？

example: The constant noise from the construction site really annoys the residents.
exampleZh: 建筑工地持续不断的噪音真的让居民们很恼火。

example: The long lecture seemed to bore everyone in the entire lecture hall.
exampleZh: 那场冗长的讲座似乎让整个报告厅的每个人都感到厌烦。

example: It is wrong to cheat on an exam; you should study honestly instead.
exampleZh: 考试作弊是不对的，你应该诚实地学习。

example: He was arrested for committing credit card fraud last year.
exampleZh: 他因去年实施信用卡诈骗而被捕。

example: You should never deceive your loved ones about important matters.
exampleZh: 你绝不应该在重要事情上欺骗你的亲人。

example: Some animals can perceive sounds that are inaudible to humans.
exampleZh: 有些动物能感知到人类听不到的声音。

example: It is hard to conceive how people lived without electricity centuries ago.
exampleZh: 很难想象几个世纪前人们没有电是如何生活的。

example: Please turn off the music so I can concentrate on my studies.
exampleZh: 请关掉音乐，这样我才能专心学习。

example: The factory machines stood idle for months due to lack of orders.
exampleZh: 由于缺乏订单，工厂的机器闲置了数月。

example: Many adolescents struggle with self-identity during their teenage years.
exampleZh: 许多青少年在十几岁时都在为自我认同而苦恼。

example: There was a faint smell of flowers coming from the garden nearby.
exampleZh: 从附近的花园飘来淡淡的花香。

zh: 使震惊；使昏迷；使目瞪口呆
example: The news of his sudden resignation stunned everyone in the company.
exampleZh: 他突然辞职的消息震惊了公司的每一个人。

example: Clean water is becoming increasingly scarce in many parts of the world.
exampleZh: 在世界许多地方，清洁水正变得越来越稀缺。

example: The carpenter built a beautiful bookshelf for our new living room.
exampleZh: 木匠为我们新客厅做了一个漂亮的书架。

zh: 兴奋；激动；一阵强烈的感觉
example: The children felt a thrill of excitement as the roller coaster climbed higher.
exampleZh: 当过山车爬得越来越高时，孩子们感到一阵兴奋。

example: All his attempts to fix the broken machine were completely in vain.
exampleZh: 他修理那台坏机器的所有尝试都是徒劳的。

example: She suffers from anxiety before every important exam at school.
exampleZh: 她在学校每次重要考试前都会感到焦虑。

example: We had to postpone the picnic because of the unexpected heavy rain.
exampleZh: 由于突如其来的大雨，我们不得不推迟野餐。

example: The flight had a two-hour delay caused by bad weather conditions.
exampleZh: 航班因恶劣天气延误了两小时。

example: The committee decided to defer the final decision until the next meeting.
exampleZh: 委员会决定将最终决定推迟到下次会议。

example: Opinions on this topic differ greatly from one person to another.
exampleZh: 关于这个话题，意见因人而异，差别很大。

example: Many people suffer from allergies during the spring season each year.
exampleZh: 每年春天都有很多人遭受过敏之苦。

example: He asked to transfer to the Shanghai office for personal reasons.
exampleZh: 他因个人原因要求调到上海办事处。

example: From the evidence, we can infer that the fire was started deliberately.
exampleZh: 从证据来看，我们可以推断这场火灾是蓄意引起的。

example: Please refer to the user manual if you have any questions about the device.
exampleZh: 如果你对设备有任何疑问，请参考用户手册。

example: The board will confer with legal experts before making a final ruling.
exampleZh: 董事会将在做出最终裁决之前与法律专家商议。

example: The fertile soil along the river is perfect for growing crops.
exampleZh: 河流沿岸肥沃的土壤非常适合种植庄稼。

example: I prefer spending my weekends outdoors rather than staying at home.
exampleZh: 我更喜欢在户外度过周末，而不是待在家里。

zh: 以前的；先前的；上一个的
example: My previous job was much more stressful than the one I have now.
exampleZh: 我以前的工作比现在的工作压力大得多。

example: Justice will prevail in the end, no matter how long it takes.
exampleZh: 无论需要多长时间，正义最终会获胜。

example: Smartphone use is prevalent among people of all age groups today.
exampleZh: 如今，智能手机在各个年龄段的人群中都很普及。

zh: 漠不关心的；冷淡的；不感兴趣的
example: He seemed completely indifferent to the criticism he received from others.
exampleZh: 他对他人的批评似乎完全漠不关心。

example: Switch the phone to silent mode during the meeting to avoid interruptions.
exampleZh: 在会议期间将手机调至静音模式以避免干扰。

example: Despite his enormous wealth, he lives a very modest and simple life.
exampleZh: 尽管他非常富有，却过着非常简朴低调的生活。

example: Nobody likes him because he is so arrogant and refuses to listen to others.
exampleZh: 没有人喜欢他，因为他太傲慢，不肯听别人意见。

zh: 雄辩的；有口才的；富于表情的
example: The speaker gave an eloquent speech that moved the entire audience to tears.
exampleZh: 演讲者发表了一篇雄辩的演讲，感动了全场观众。

example: He made an earnest attempt to apologize for his rude behavior yesterday.
exampleZh: 他真诚地试图为昨天粗鲁的行为道歉。

example: Moderate exercise is good for your health, but do not overdo it.
exampleZh: 适度的锻炼对你的健康有益，但不要过度。

example: A good sense of humor can help you get through difficult times.
exampleZh: 幽默感可以帮助你度过困难时期。

example: It is wise to invest your money in a diversified portfolio of stocks.
exampleZh: 将你的资金投资于多元化的股票组合是明智的。

example: The students were eager to learn more about the fascinating topic.
exampleZh: 学生们渴望了解更多关于这个引人入胜的话题。

example: The company plans to release a new version of the software next month.
exampleZh: 公司计划在下个月发布该软件的新版本。

example: I received a package from my friend who lives in Japan today.
exampleZh: 我今天收到了住在日本的朋友寄来的包裹。

example: He made a pledge to donate half of his income to charity every year.
exampleZh: 他立下誓言，每年将一半的收入捐给慈善机构。

example: The audience stood up to applaud the amazing performance of the actors.
exampleZh: 观众站起来为演员们精彩的表演鼓掌。

example: You can modify the document to better fit your specific requirements.
exampleZh: 你可以修改文件以更好地满足你的具体要求。

example: Please mute your microphone when you are not speaking during the online meeting.
exampleZh: 在线会议中不说话时请将麦克风静音。

example: The residents had to flee their homes when the flood waters began to rise.
exampleZh: 洪水开始上涨时，居民们不得不逃离家园。

zh: 爬行；匍匐前进；缓慢行进
example: Babies usually learn to crawl before they start to walk on their own.
exampleZh: 婴儿通常在学会自己走路之前先学会爬行。

example: The journalist continued to probe into the details of the corruption scandal.
exampleZh: 记者继续深入调查这起腐败丑闻的细节。

example: Parents often make great sacrifices to give their children a better life.
exampleZh: 父母常常为了给孩子更好的生活而做出巨大牺牲。

example: No one has the right to humiliate another person in front of others.
exampleZh: 没有人有权在别人面前羞辱他人。

example: Despite his great success, he remains a very humble and approachable person.
exampleZh: 尽管取得了很大成功，他仍然是一个非常谦逊、平易近人的人。

example: The police were called to investigate the mysterious disappearance of the woman.
exampleZh: 警方被叫来调查这名女子的神秘失踪案。

example: The heart is one of the most vital organs in the human body.
exampleZh: 心脏是人体最重要的器官之一。

example: We need someone to organize the annual company event this December.
exampleZh: 我们需要有人来组织今年12月的公司年度活动。

example: The prisoner suffered terrible torture during his years in captivity.
exampleZh: 那名囚犯在被关押期间遭受了可怕的折磨。

example: The postman left a parcel on our doorstep while we were out.
exampleZh: 我们外出时，邮递员把一个包裹放在了我们的门口。

example: She managed to conquer her fear of public speaking through regular practice.
exampleZh: 她通过经常练习成功克服了对公开演讲的恐惧。
